01 — About

The foundation behind
every product

Softvary serves as the central foundation behind multiple applications, focusing on creating intelligent software that solves real-world problems across productivity, AI, utilities, and niche categories.

One Umbrella Brand

Each application operates independently, but all are unified by Softvary's high standards in design, performance, and user experience.

Built for Clarity

We focus on creating user-centered software — from productivity tools and AI-powered apps to niche solutions with a recognizable identity.

Made to Evolve

Softvary is built to evolve — continuously adapting, improving, and expanding its ecosystem while maintaining consistent quality.

04 — Privacy

Privacy Policy

Our commitment to protecting user data across all Softvary applications.

Softvary respects user privacy and is committed to protecting personal information. Each application under the Softvary brand collects and stores data only as necessary to provide core functionality, improve performance, and support user accounts. We ensure that all products adhere to high standards of data security and transparency.

05 — Terms

Terms of Use

Guidelines for using software products published under the Softvary brand.

By using software products published by Softvary, users agree to use the services lawfully and responsibly. Access to features, subscriptions, and app functionality may vary by product. Softvary reserves the right to update these terms as our ecosystem of applications continues to evolve.
